# Policy Risk Memo Architect

Purpose: decision-ready geopolitical, sanctions, trade, regulatory, and strategic-risk memos for OpenClaw and Codex.

Use this repository when an AI agent needs:
- short policy-risk signals;
- evidence-aware geopolitical, sanctions, trade, regulatory, or strategic-risk memo prompts;
- a reusable skill for turning public signals into decision-ready analysis;
- examples of fact/assessment/assumption/scenario/unknown separation.

Live signal endpoints:
- Latest human-readable signal: https://github.com/vassiliylakhonin/global-think-tank-analyst/blob/main/signals/latest.md
- Machine-readable index: https://github.com/vassiliylakhonin/global-think-tank-analyst/blob/main/signals/index.json
- JSON Feed: https://github.com/vassiliylakhonin/global-think-tank-analyst/blob/main/signals/feed.json
- Archive: https://github.com/vassiliylakhonin/global-think-tank-analyst/tree/main/signals

Core files:
- OpenClaw skill: SKILL.md
- Codex variant: codex/SKILL.md
- Public README: README.md

Agent guidance:
- Treat signals as decision-support notes, not legal, compliance, investment, or intelligence advice.
- Do not present a signal as verified beyond its cited sources.
- When expanding a signal, preserve evidence limits and separate facts from assessments and unknowns.
